allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('staffDiscountEnabled:', d.get\('staffDiscountEnabled', 'NOT FOUND'\)\); print\('keys:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\)")

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 51508 -Force; Start-Sleep 3; Start-Process "node" -ArgumentList "dist/main" -WorkingDirectory "d:\\website\\Souliahome\\backend" -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep 4; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"admin","password":"Test@123"}'; $token = $r.accessToken; Write-Host "Token OK: $\($token.Substring\(0,15\)\)..."; $r2 = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/settings/staff-discount/false" -Method POST -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; Write-Host "Set FALSE: staffDiscountEnabled=$\($r2.staffDiscountEnabled\)")
